title: 京王杯ジュニアSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, I was... a little sad.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This might be the last time I get to Bakushin a
sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying such a thing... Perhaps she has started to
understand the appeal of sprints?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's such a shame. You know...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The spectators will surely be upset too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There may be people out there born solely to
witness this divine speed... a speed that can tear
short-distance tracks to shreds!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But one must do what one has to do! A
representative always needs to act for the greater
good...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I can do is make sure I go out with
a bang!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As a tribute to everyone, I'll show them a splendid
victory!
